description_long: This is a sturdy, classic bed frame with a paneled headboard and footboard, both featuring recessed rectangular detailing. The frame is painted in a muted, light gray color and is constructed primarily from wood, with visible wooden slats forming the mattress support base. The side rails are solid and connect seamlessly to the headboard and footboard, giving the bed a robust and cohesive appearance. The bed sits on short, blocky feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. There are no visible mattresses or bedding, and the overall design is clean and traditional, suitable for both residential and urban settings.
description: A classic light gray wooden bed frame with paneled headboard and footboard, featuring exposed wooden slats and a solid, traditional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the paneled headboard and footboard, with visible wooden slats across the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the frame, the thickness of the side rails, and the exposed slatted base.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the headboard, with the footboard partially visible and slats seen through the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with the slatted base and solid side rails.
